image:image.image:title: Cosmic Lord Shiva Face
image:image.image:caption: A mesmerizing close-up of Lord Shiva's face, adorned with cosmic elements and a serene expression.

image:image.image:title: Shiva's Trident in the Storm
image:image.image:caption: A powerful image of Lord Shiva's trident piercing through a stormy sky, symbolizing his strength and control over chaos.

image:image.image:title: Shiva's Dance of Creation
image:image.image:caption: An artistic depiction of Lord Shiva performing the cosmic dance, surrounded by vibrant colors and dynamic energy.

image:image.image:title: Shiva's Meditation in the Himalayas
image:image.image:caption: A serene image of Lord Shiva meditating on a mountaintop, with the majestic Himalayas in the background.

image:image.image:title: Shiva's Third Eye Awakening
image:image.image:caption: A captivating image of Lord Shiva's third eye opening, radiating intense energy and wisdom.

image:image.image:title: Temple Bells and Morning Light
image:image.image:caption: A devotional frame capturing the peaceful atmosphere of early worship at Kantore.

image:image.image:title: Sacred Procession Moment
image:image.image:caption: A vibrant visual from the festival procession filled with rhythm, color, and faith.

image:image.image:title: Ritual Fire and Devotion
image:image.image:caption: A striking image reflecting the intensity and purity of Shiva rituals.

image:image.image:title: Evening Aarti at Kantore
image:image.image:caption: An evening devotional scene illuminated by prayer lamps and collective reverence.

image:image.image:title: Mahadev Hero Visual
image:image.image:caption: Hero section visual used for the main landing experience.
